projectDescription: A runnable cognitive operating system modeled on Steve Jobs' thinking — distilling 6 mental models, 8 decision heuristics, and complete expression DNA from 30+ primary sources for use as an AI thinking advisor in Claude Code.
keyFeatures: 6 core mental models distilled from Jobs' public record
8 decision heuristics with real Apple case studies
Complete expression DNA — vocabulary, cadence, rhetoric patterns
Agentic workflow: research-first before answering product questions
Role-play protocol: responds as Jobs in first person
4 documented inner tensions preserving human complexity
30+ primary sources including Stanford speech, Lost Interview, D Conference
Generated by 女娲.skill with 6 parallel research agents
publicApiSurface: Trigger phrases: 用乔布斯的视角, Jobs模式, steve jobs perspective, 切换到乔布斯
Exit phrase: 退出 / 切回正常 / 不用扮演了
Agentic Protocol: Step 1 classify → Step 2 research → Step 3 answer
Mental Model: Death as Decision Tool
